title: Quiz: Motion Graphs and Their Interpretation
subject: physics

questions.question: What does the slope of a position-time graph represent?
questions.explanation: The slope of a position-time graph gives the velocity.

questions.question: What does the area under a velocity-time graph represent?
questions.explanation: The area under a velocity-time graph gives the displacement.

questions.question: A straight line on a velocity-time graph indicates:
questions.explanation: A straight line (not horizontal) means constant acceleration.

questions.question: What does the area under an acceleration-time graph represent?
questions.explanation: The area under an acceleration-time graph gives the change in velocity.

questions.question: If a position-time graph is a curve, what does this indicate?
questions.explanation: A curve means the velocity is changing, so there is acceleration.

questions.question: A velocity-time graph shows a horizontal line at 5 m/s for 10 seconds. What is the displacement?
